since_last: 35% of 101 AI names green; Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads +1.68%; AI bubble risk 50 Neutral.

cards.headline: The tape: broad selling, 35% of AI names green
cards.body: SPX -0.08% · BTC -0.96% · Gold +1.93% · Nasdaq100 -0.51%. 35% of 101 AI names are green — broad selling. Chip Equipment & AI Hardware is doing the heavy lifting at +1.68%.

cards.headline: Chip Equipment & AI Hardware leads, AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure lags
cards.body: Strongest AI sector is Chip Equipment & AI Hardware at +1.68%; weakest is AI Software & Cloud Infrastructure at -2.42%. Rotation within the AI trade, not a one-way move.

cards.headline: SMCI is the standout at +21.41%
cards.body: Leaders: SMCI +21.41%, CBRS +13.32%, DELL +7.51%, OKLO +6.32%, HPE +4.15%. Laggards: PATH -7.89%, GEV -6.56%, APP -3.92%, SKHY -3.77%.
cards.watch: Hot means attention, not direction — watch whether the leaders hold the bid or fade into the next session.

cards.headline: SpaceX (SPCX) -0.43% at $123.01
cards.body: The SpaceX debut keeps pulling attention — SPCX is -0.43% this session. The biggest IPO in history remains the tape's attention magnet.

cards.headline: Risk: AI bubble index 50 — Neutral
cards.body: The composite AI Bubble Index sits at 50/100, led by Valuation at 85. Higher = frothier; the risk is everyone caring at once while valuations are already stretched.
